positive: A minimalist and stylized scene featuring a majestic mountain range silhouette at sunset. The sky is a gradient wash of deep indigo, vibrant burnt orange, and soft lavender, emphasizing dramatic contrast. In the foreground, include a small, serene winding river or path leading toward the mountains. The overall aesthetic should be clean, geometric, and highly graphic, designed as a perfect circular repeat pattern. The style is a blend of modern abstract art and nature illustration, suitable for linocut or woodblock print textures. Focus on sharp, clean outlines and vibrant, harmonious color blocking. Central composition, highly detailed, high contrast, vector art style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low detail, graffiti, messy, grainy, photo-realistic
